description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that handles linting, testing, and deployment across multiple Python versions and operating systems. The workflow should trigger on push to master and specific backport branches, on pull requests to those branches, and on a daily schedule. It should include a linter job that checks code style, a test job matrix that runs unit tests across Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and PyPy 3.8 on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows, and a deploy job that uploads distributions to PyPI when a tag is pushed.
